reviews.review_description: Amazing! Currently it’s a little buggy but I think there’s great potential. The player model is so cool and I love the pets. I found the game through a YouTube video and I’ve been waiting since. Dev if you see this keep working on this and don’t give up. Also Could we collab in some way? 10/10

developer_response.body: Sorry it has taken me so long to respond to this review. Thank you so much for the positivity! A collaboration would be very fun, so yes we could make it happen. The game is under much development at the moment so it would have to wait for the Bluddle Re-release. But while your waiting, it would be much appreciated if you where to join the Discord. Have a blessed day!
